title: Profitable Schemes
hints: This problem involves selecting a subset of items with constraints on weight and value, suggesting a dynamic programming approach similar to the knapsack problem.
Track the maximum profit achievable for each possible number of members used, capping profit at minProfit since any excess is treated the same.
Use a 2D DP array where dp[i][j] represents the number of ways to achieve exactly j profit using a subset of the first i crimes.
